item.title: Download Veeam Agent 13.0.2.1102
item.description: Veeam Agent for Windows is backup and recovery software developed by Veeam Software. The software can run on a schedule and it also includes features like backup validation and the ability to restore the entire system or individual files. Veeam Agent also allows users to backup data to local storage, network shares and cloud storage such as Veeam Backup & Replication, Veeam Cloud Connect, AWS, Azure, and more It can be used as a standalone solution or integrated with Veeam Backup...
